title: Korak 2

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents:
Let's play Rock, Paper, Scissors!

Rules to the game

You will be playing against the computer.

You can choose between Rock, Paper, and Scissors.

The first one to three points wins.

Here are the rules to getting a point in the game:

  • Rock beats Scissors
  • Scissors beats Paper
  • Paper beats Rock

If the player and computer choose the same option (e.g., Paper and Paper), then no one gets the point.

Player Score: 0 Computer Score: 0

Choose an option:

challengeFiles.name: styles

tests.text: Vaš kriterijum za options treba da bude red podataka.
Tvoja baza podataka za options treba da ima niz karaktera "Rock".
Red vaših podataka za options treba da ima sekvencu slova "Paper".
Vaš red podataka za options mora imati sekvencu karaktera "Scissors".

description:
U prvom dijelu radionice, obratit ćete pažnju na izradu funkcije koja generiše nasumične opcije za računar.

Počnite kreiranjem parametra nazvanog options i postavite mu vrednost niza podataka sa sledećom sekvencijom: "Rock", "Paper", na "Scissors".
